mapper.sql: id, apply_patent_id, author_id, author_code, author_name, author_type, author_dept_name, author_dept_code, author_division_code, degree, edu_level, title, sex, ranking, work_ratio, note, is_our_hosp
mapper.select: select spaa.id as rowId, spaa.author_id as authorId, puser.name as authorName, spaa.author_type as authorType, ccspt.name as authorTypeName, spaa.author_code as authorCode, spaa.sex,spaa.degree as degree,csed.name as degreeName, spaa.edu_level as eduLevel,csel.name as eduLevelName, spaa.title as title,ccsti.name as titleName, sauthororder.code as ranking,sauthororder.name as rankingName, spaa.sex as sex, case when spaa.sex=0 then '女' when spaa.sex=1 then '男' else '' END as sexName, spaa.note as note, spaa.is_our_hosp as isOurHosp,spaa.work_ratio as workRatio,spaa.note as note from srm_patent_apply_author spaa left join ct_srm_user puser on puser.id=spaa.author_id left join ct_srm_person_type ccspt on ccspt.code=spaa.author_type left join ct_srm_title_info ccsti on ccsti.code=spaa.title left join ct_srm_edu_degree csed on csed.code=spaa.degree left join ct_srm_edu_level csel on csel.code=spaa.edu_level left join ct_srm_paper_author_order sauthororder on sauthororder.code=spaa.ranking where apply_patent_id=#{patentApplyId}
